title: Jing Chikka Jing Chikka Lyrics Veeram Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Jing Chikka
Singers: Pushpavanam Kuppusamy, Magizhini Manimaaran
Movie: Veeram
Music : Devi Sri Prasad
Lyrics: Viveka

Adiye thaarumaaraa thaavura mudhalu
en nenjukulla ninnukittu oodura visilu
Jing chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Kulichu kondapottu koovura kuyilu
en thandavaalam kandamaaga ottura railu
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Kurumbu payapulla, kurumbu payapulla
kenathukulla vandhu kappal vidaadha
thiruttu payapulla thiruttu payapulla
thorandha veetukulla kannam podaadha
un tholpatta mannalli pocketil
vachirukken kandukaama, kambi neettaadha

Maama ippadi konjudhey
yema ippadi minjura!!

Ayyayo aambala icevandi pola
ada ice vache ice vache
kavuthuduvaa girla
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Valadhu kannirukkum penoruthimela
ada idadhu kannu meyumappa
innoruthimela
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Pillayaar kovil kozhukatta pola
neyum kanna rendum vachirukka
kaluthukku mela
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Aduppu mela vacha paal chatti pola
ne pongura paathu paathu poonayachu moola
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Azhagu payapulla azhagu puyapula
 valaya virichittu kaathirukaadha
 un kaal vella kai vella
paathadhum peche varala
....

ayyo pechu moochillaa kedakkaan
yedhavudhu paathu seyen..

Vaayilla poochinu paavapatta pochi
ivan muttakannu katti vachi
keechiduvaan keechi
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Ora kannaala paakkura saaichi
idhu thappaana paarva
en dhaavani saatchi
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Sandhana saaraayam serndhitta kalava
un saayalil paathen di
yelu ettu nilava..
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Idupil sumakkira vaanavil valaiva
engeyum paakalye ippadi patta alava..
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Kirukku payapulla kirukku payapula
kuruttu valiyila scene-a podaadha

Ye kaluvura meenula naluvura meenu
kaiyya vittu thulli podaadha
Adi kaena sirikki, un mansenna kalla

Manasil vachirukken ambuttu aasa
ada koocham vandhu thadukku
vaai vittu pesa..
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

Adiye,
usura pesaikkudhu nee sirikkum osai
unnavachi nenjikulla seyiren poosa.
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan
JIng chakkaa jing chakka jing chakka
jungidu chakkaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Jing Chikka Jing Chikka?

The song is an energetic folk number that celebrates joy and festivity.

Who are the singers of this song?

Magizhini Manimaarran and Pushpavanam Kuppusamy lend their voices to this lively track.

Who composed the music for Veeram?

The music for Veeram was composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in a celebratory scene, enhancing the festive atmosphere of the film.

When was the song released?

The song was released in 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Jing Chikka Jing Chikka is a lively and energetic song from the movie Veeram, capturing the spirit of celebration and festivity. The song features traditional folk elements with a modern twist, making it a perfect fit for joyous occasions. Sung by Magizhini Manimaarran and Pushpavanam Kuppusamy, the track is set against a backdrop of vibrant dance sequences. The music by Devi Sri Prasad adds to the song's infectious energy, making it a memorable part of the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Jing Chikka Jing Chikka from the movie Veeram is a vibrant and energetic folk number that captures the essence of celebration. With Devi Sri Prasad's dynamic composition and the powerful vocals of Magizhini Manimaarran and Pushpavanam Kuppusamy, this song is a perfect blend of traditional beats and modern flair. Experience the festive spirit and lively rhythms that make this track a standout in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Hey dear, your playful teasing is like a whistle echoing in my heart.
The cuckoo sings after a bath, and the train runs through my land.
Mischievous little boy, sneaking around like a thief, don't make a fuss in the open house. I've kept your shoulder cloth in my pocket secretly.
Uncle, why are you pampering like this? Oh, you're going too far!
Oh no, like an ice cream truck, the girl will melt your heart.
The right eye is on one girl, and the left eye is on another.
Like the dumplings at the temple, you have two eyes above your neck.
Like milk boiling over on the stove, you overflow, and the cat is watching from the corner.
Beautiful little girl, don't wait with your bangles spread out. When I see your white feet and hands, I can't speak.
Oh no, I'm speechless, do something quickly.
Like a fly without a mouth, this guy will keep nagging with his big eyes.
Looking with one eye, this is a wrong look, my scarf is the witness.
Like a mix of sandalwood and liquor, I see seven or eight moons in your style.
The rainbow curve on your waist is unmatched anywhere.
Crazy little boy, don't create a scene in the blind alley.
Hey, slippery fish, don't jump out of my hands.
Hey, smile a little, is your heart made of stone?
I have a lot of desires in my heart, but shyness stops me from speaking.
Hey dear, your laughter makes my heart speak, and I feel like painting it inside.
